THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARELLANO, LUIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2813 FOLSOM STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,200.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,200.00, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
